## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / tooling only
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Breaking change (describe migration)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` is green locally (new/changed behaviour has tests)
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] README tool list updated if the public tool surface changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
